title: Ovarian Cancer Diagnostics Market Size to Reach USD 8.08 Billion by 2035 | SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global ovarian cancer diagnostics market is valued at USD 4.92 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 8.08 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 5.06%. Growth is driven by rising ovarian cancer incidence, increasing adoption of AI-powered imaging, biomarker testing, and precision oncology diagnostics. North America leads with 41.2% market share, while imaging and hospital laboratories dominate their respective segments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a leading market player with recent expansion of Cobas platform for CA-125 and HE4 assays, demonstrating active product development and market presence in ovarian cancer diagnostics.

Identified as a major diagnostic firm in North America with expertise in genetic testing, positioned to benefit from growing BRCA1/BRCA2 testing adoption.

title: Global Automated Liquid Handling Systems Market Size/Share Worth USD 6.9 Billion by 2035 at a 9.8% CAGR: Healthcare Foresights (Analysis, Outlook, Leaders, Report, Trends, Forecast, Segmentation, Growth Rate, Value, SWOT Analysis)
author: Healthcare Foresights
description: The global automated liquid handling systems market is valued at USD 2.7 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 6.9 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 9.8%. Growth is driven by increasing pharmaceutical R&D, clinical trials, technological advancements, and demand for automation in diagnostics and molecular testing. Key players include Eppendorf SE, PerkinElmer Inc., Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., and QIAGEN NV.

title: Global Cell and Gene Therapy CDMO Market Anticipating Remarkable Growth at a CAGR of ~24% by 2034 | DelveInsight
author: Delveinsight
description: The cell and gene therapy CDMO market is projected to grow from USD 8.3 billion in 2025 to USD 57.1 billion by 2034, driven by increasing clinical development of advanced therapies, rising outsourcing trends among biopharma companies, and technological advancements in manufacturing. North America leads the market with 40% share, while Asia-Pacific emerges as a significant growth hub. Key players are expanding manufacturing capabilities through strategic partnerships.

title: Tissue Diagnostics Market to Reach USD 9.33 Bn by 2031 Driven by Expanding Precision Oncology Applications and Rising Adoption of Digital Pathology, Says Mordor Intelligence
author: Mordor Intelligence
description: The global tissue diagnostics market is projected to grow from USD 6.45 billion in 2025 to USD 9.33 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 6.35%. Growth is driven by increasing cancer prevalence, rising adoption of precision medicine, advancements in digital pathology and AI-assisted diagnostics, and expanding biomarker-based testing. North America leads the market while Asia-Pacific emerges as a high-growth region.
